name: EverAfter Planner
tagline: Plan your wedding in one calm place.
shortDescription: Manage checklist, budget, guests, vendors, timeline, seating, reminders, and settings in one shared planning space.
description: EverAfter Planner helps couples organize wedding planning from one clean iPhone workspace. Track progress across checklist phases, keep budget visibility, manage guests and RSVPs, coordinate vendors, run a clear day-of timeline, and handle reminders in one place.

screenshots.alt: EverAfter Planner dashboard with countdown and planning snapshot
EverAfter Planner checklist progress by planning phase
EverAfter Planner budget overview and category breakdown
EverAfter Planner guest list and RSVP status management
EverAfter Planner vendor organization and follow-up reminders
EverAfter Planner wedding day timeline schedule
EverAfter Planner seating overview and table assignments
EverAfter Planner reminder center for tasks and due dates
EverAfter Planner settings and shared planner management

features: Shared and personal planner switching
Phase-based wedding checklist tracking
Budget estimates versus actual spend
Guest list and RSVP contact management
Vendor organization and follow-up reminders
Wedding day timeline builder
Seating and table assignment overview
Central reminder center for planning tasks

name: GigTracker
tagline: Track miles, earnings, expenses, and invoices across Apple devices.
shortDescription: GigTracker helps gig workers and independent drivers log trips, review earnings, capture expenses, manage invoices, and stay on top of business follow-ups from iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch.
description: GigTracker is a mileage and business tracker built for delivery drivers, freelancers, and independent operators who need more than a simple trip log. Track drives automatically, organize trips, review earnings, capture expenses, draft invoices, monitor reports, and work through a business inbox from one cross-device Apple workflow.

screenshots.alt: GigTracker dashboard with daily mileage, earnings, and trip activity overview
GigTracker trips screen with logged drives and mileage history
GigTracker earnings screen with payout tracking and performance totals
GigTracker expenses screen for tracking costs and receipts
GigTracker invoices screen for drafting and managing client billing
GigTracker reports screen with business summaries and trend breakdowns
GigTracker inbox surfacing follow-ups, unclassified work, and outstanding tasks
GigTracker more screen with settings, tools, and additional business controls

features: Automatic and manual trip tracking
Mileage history with trip review and classification
Earnings tracking across gigs and clients
Expense logging with receipt-friendly workflows
Invoice drafting and follow-up management
Business reports and summary insights
Cross-device workflow across iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch
Widget and Live Activity support for quick status views

name: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay
tagline: Run real-time fantasy football broadcast overlays for Yahoo, ESPN, and Sleeper inside OBS.
shortDescription: A local-first Node.js overlay system for OBS Browser Source with matchup rotations, ticker mode, touchdown alerts, provider-aware themes, setup tooling, and admin controls.
description: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay is a published local-first broadcast tool built for fantasy football creators and streamers who want real-time overlays in OBS. The product supports Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and mock mode, with scene-ready browser routes, a guided setup center, an admin control panel, provider-aware themes, event alerts, and production-minded reliability features for live fantasy coverage.

screenshots.alt: Fantasy Football OBS Overlay admin configuration panel with provider settings and runtime controls
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay centered card scene showing a featured fantasy matchup
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay lower-third scene for a compact fantasy football broadcast layout
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay sidebar two-up scene with multiple matchups visible at once
Fantasy Football OBS Overlay bottom ticker scene for scrolling matchup updates in OBS

features: Local-first Node.js app designed for OBS Browser Source workflows
Yahoo, ESPN, Sleeper, and mock provider support
Setup Center with copy-ready scene URLs for OBS
Admin control panel for provider configuration and runtime controls
Multiple overlay modes including centered card, lower-third, sidebar, and ticker
Touchdown, lead-change, and score-delta alert support
Production-minded reliability with cache fallback, retries, and safe-mode startup
Optional OBS WebSocket, Discord, Slack, and export integrations
minIOSVersion: OBS Browser Source + local Node.js runtime
compatibility: OBS Browser Source, macOS, Windows, or Linux with Node.js 18.17+

name: Fantasy Football Hub
tagline: Track matchups, manage leagues, and monitor fantasy football insights from one place.
shortDescription: Fantasy Football Hub is an in-development fantasy football companion app focused on league dashboards, matchup views, waiver planning, roster notes, and API-powered player and scoring workflows.
description: Fantasy Football Hub is a fantasy football management and companion app currently in development. The product is being designed to help fantasy players review league activity, track matchups, watch waiver priorities, compare roster decisions, monitor player trends, and work from one cleaner interface as external fantasy sports APIs are integrated.

screenshots.alt: Fantasy Football Hub dashboard concept with league summary, standings, and matchup status
Fantasy Football Hub matchup screen concept with team comparisons and projected scoring
Fantasy Football Hub waiver and roster moves concept with add-drop planning
Fantasy Football Hub player research concept with trends, notes, and API-backed insights

features: League overview and standings dashboard
Weekly matchup tracking and score monitoring
Waiver wire and roster move planning
Player trend, matchup, and note workflows
API-powered fantasy data integrations in progress
Designed for iPhone-first fantasy football management
